executives.name: Mark Zuckerberg
executives.background: Mark Zuckerberg is the founder, Chairman, and CEO of Meta. He founded the company in 2004 and has served as CEO since its inception.

tenure_dates.title: Founder, Chairman, and Chief Executive Officer
Founder, Chairman, and Chief Executive Officer

executives.name: Susan Li
executives.background: Susan Li has served as our Chief Financial Officer since November 2022. She previously served as our Vice President of Finance from 2016 to 2022.

executives.name: Javier Olivan
executives.background: Javier Olivan has served as our Chief Operating Officer since August 2022. He joined the company in 2007 and previously served as Chief Growth Officer.

executives.name: Chris Cox
executives.background: Chris Cox is the Chief Product Officer at Meta. He joined the company in 2005 and has led the development of many of its core products.

executives.name: Andrew Bosworth
executives.background: Andrew Bosworth has served as our Chief Technology Officer since 2022. He joined the company in 2006 and previously led Reality Labs.

tenure_dates.title: Chief Technology Officer (Head of Reality Labs)

executives.name: Andrew Houston
executives.background: Co-founder and CEO of Dropbox, Inc.

executives.name: Hock Tan
executives.background: Mr. Tan has served as President, Chief Executive Officer and a director of Broadcom since March 2006. From September 2005 to January 2008, he served as Chairman of the Board of Integrated Device Technology, Inc. Prior to that, he was President and CEO of Integrated Circuit Systems, Inc. from June 1999 to September 2005. He has also held senior executive positions at Commodore International, Ltd., PepsiCo, Inc. and General Motors Corporation.

executives.name: Kevin Weil
executives.background: Mr. Weil has served as our President, Product and Business since May 2021. Prior to joining Planet, Mr. Weil served as Vice President of Product for Novi at Facebook from 2018 to 2021 and as Vice President of Product at Instagram from 2016 to 2018. Mr. Weil holds a B.A. in Mathematics and Physics from Rice University and an M.S. in Physics from Stanford University.

executives.name: Marc Andreessen
executives.background: Co-founder and General Partner of Andreessen Horowitz.

tenure_dates.title: Member of the Board of Directors

executives.name: Nancy Killefer
executives.background: Retired Senior Partner at McKinsey & Company.

tenure_dates.title: Member of the Board of Directors

executives.name: Peggy Alford
executives.background: Executive Vice President, Global Sales at PayPal Holdings, Inc.

executives.name: Peter Thiel
executives.background: Mr. Thiel is one of our co-founders and has served as the Chairman of our Board since 2003. He is a technology entrepreneur and investor, co-founding PayPal and serving as its CEO and Chairman. He was also the first outside investor in Facebook. Mr. Thiel holds a B.A. in Philosophy from Stanford University and a J.D. from Stanford Law School.

tenure_dates.title: Member of the Board of Directors

executives.name: Sheryl Sandberg
executives.background: Former Chief Operating Officer of Meta Platforms, Inc.

executives.name: Tony Xu
executives.background: Co-founder and CEO of DoorDash, Inc.

executives.name: Tracey Travis
executives.background: Executive Vice President and CFO of The Estée Lauder Companies Inc.
